Petition To Approve Compromise For Minor
Off Calendar Mar-05-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action for the Minor, Iolana Schiaretti.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Michael Shintaku, CSR #8251. Telephone: 408-410-8090. Email: emailformike@hotmail.com.

Nathan M. Siedman, Esq. appeared with petitioner Joshua Schiaretti, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Iolana Schiaretti, who was not present for this morning's proceedings.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
Order appointing Mr. Schiaretti Guardian ad Litem for the minor was filed March 27, 2019.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the Compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $24,909.33.
Attorney Fees - $3,316.75.
Medical Bills/Liens - $8,011.13.
Costs - $2,910.50.

The net balance of $10,670.95 shall be deposited into the minor's 529 Education Savings Plan, as fully described in Attachment 7c(2)(b) of the Order Approving the Compromise.

Counsel for petitioner shall prepare the proposed Order Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action for the Minor and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Matter is CONTINUED to May 7, 2020 for a Progress Report on the funding of the Minor's 529 Education Savings Plan.
